title: GlowingOres
description:
Makes Ores glow in the dark!
Never miss a single ore vein again.
body:
# GlowingOres

Enhance your cave exploration experience with this resource pack that makes ores glow in the dark! Never miss a single ore vein again, and navigate through dark caves in a time saving and effortless way.

##    **Features**

- Glowing ores for improved visibility

- Perfect for cave exploration and mining

This pack adds a functional touch to your Minecraft experience, making it easier to spot valuable ores or resources in the often dark depths of caves.

### **Optifine**

To use glowing ores without Optifine, you can:

-Use the pack like that(only supports highlighting the ores without Optifine)

- Install [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) for block and item emissive textures.

Keep in mind that some mods might require specific configurations or have limitations.
